text: What shall be conducted during a fire and boat drill?

options.text: Cargo tank hatches must be opened for visual gas checking
All watertight doors in the vicinity of the drill shall be operated
Emergency bilge suctions must be run on full backflow parameters
Lifeboats must be launched and run at service speeds for an hour

explanation: During a combined fire and boat drill, operational checks of essential safety equipment are conducted. Operating watertight doors in the vicinity of the drill ensures their functionality and familiarizes the crew with their operation under simulated emergency conditions.
